name: GitHub Webhook
description: Receive GitHub webhooks and notify agents for automated tasks per event type.
author: Evonic

variables.name: WEBHOOK_SECRET
variables.label: Webhook Secret
variables.description: HMAC-SHA256 secret key used to verify incoming GitHub webhook signatures.

variables.name: RELEASE_AGENT_ID
variables.label: Agent ID
variables.description: Agent ID to notify when a release is published. Leave empty to ignore.

variables.name: RELEASE_PROMPT
variables.label: Prompt Template
variables.description: Prompt template sent to the agent. Variables: {{tag_name}}, {{name}}, {{body}}, {{html_url}}, {{repository}}, {{action}}.

variables.name: RELEASE_FILTERS
variables.label: Filters (JSON)
variables.description: JSON array of filters to apply before notifying. E.g. [{"field": "release.prerelease", "match": "equals", "value": "false"}]. Empty = fire always.

variables.name: PR_AGENT_ID
variables.label: Agent ID
variables.description: Agent ID to notify on PR events. Leave empty to ignore.

variables.name: PR_PROMPT
variables.label: Prompt Template
variables.description: Prompt template for PR events. Variables: {{title}}, {{action}}, {{html_url}}, {{body}}, {{repository}}, {{state}}.

variables.name: PR_FILTERS
variables.label: Filters (JSON)
variables.description: JSON array of filters to apply before notifying. E.g. [{"field": "action", "match": "equals", "value": "opened"}]. Empty = fire always.

variables.name: ISSUES_AGENT_ID
variables.label: Agent ID
variables.description: Agent ID to notify on issues events. Leave empty to ignore.

variables.name: ISSUES_PROMPT
variables.label: Prompt Template
variables.description: Prompt template for issues events. Variables: {{title}}, {{action}}, {{html_url}}, {{body}}, {{repository}}, {{state}}.

variables.name: ISSUES_FILTERS
variables.label: Filters (JSON)
variables.description: JSON array of filters to apply before notifying. E.g. [{"field": "issue.state", "match": "equals", "value": "open"}]. Empty = fire always.

variables.name: PUSH_AGENT_ID
variables.label: Agent ID
variables.description: Agent ID to notify on push events. Leave empty to ignore.

variables.name: PUSH_PROMPT
variables.label: Prompt Template
variables.description: Prompt template for push events. Variables: {{ref}}, {{commits_count}}, {{repository}}, {{compare}}.

variables.name: PUSH_FILTERS
variables.label: Filters (JSON)
variables.description: JSON array of filters to apply before notifying. E.g. [{"field": "ref", "match": "regex", "value": "^refs/heads/main$"}]. Empty = fire always.
